message:
debug(wizer): Add verbose stderr flushing for CI debugging

Add explicit stderr flushing after each debug print in wizer_wamr.zig
to ensure error messages are visible even if the process crashes.

This helps diagnose the silent failure on Linux CI where Wizer
pre-initialization fails after "Loading" without showing any error.

New debug output points:
- WAMR runtime initialization
- WASM module loading
- Module instantiation (with heap/stack sizes)
- Execution environment creation
- Init function lookup and execution
- Snapshot and rewrite stages
